next_steps: Perform magnetic resonance venography (MRV) to rule out cerebral venous thrombosis
Perform lumbar puncture with measurement of opening pressure and cerebrospinal fluid analysis (cell count, glucose, protein, gram stain, fungal/bacterial cultures, and cryptococcal antigen)
Perform ophthalmologic examination to evaluate for papilledema or ischemic optic neuropathy
Check erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) to evaluate for giant cell arteritis
Evaluate for medication-induced adverse effects or drug-drug interactions contributing to neurological symptoms
